ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the state is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_facilities" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the facility */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the facility is located */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the facility is located */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the facility is located */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., hospital, clinic, etc.) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the facility */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_facilities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_facilities_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission mapping */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_data_sources" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare data-data source mapping */,
  "healthcare_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare data */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_data_sources_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_facility_services" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare facility service */,
  "healthcare_facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare facility */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_facility_services_healthcare_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("healthcare_facility_id") REFERENCES healthcare_facilities ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_facility_service_providers" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare facility service provider */,
  "healthcare_facility_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare facility service */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of provider (e.g., doctor, nurse, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_facility_service_providers_healthcare_facility_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("healthcare_facility_service_id") REFERENCES healthcare_facility_services ("id")
)
